2026-05-01T20:01:13.5092405Z ##[group]Run # Determine mode from input or schedule
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5093223Z [36;1m# Determine mode from input or schedule[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5093829Z [36;1mif [ -n "$INPUT_MODE" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5094358Z [36;1m  MODE="$INPUT_MODE"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5094869Z [36;1melif [ "$SCHEDULE" = "0 7 * * *" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5095430Z [36;1m  MODE=current[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5095921Z [36;1melif [ "$SCHEDULE" = "0 17 * * *" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5097062Z [36;1m  MODE=latest[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5097511Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5097885Z [36;1m  MODE=next[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5098278Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5098696Z [36;1mecho "mode=$MODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5099221Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5099792Z [36;1m# Read current milestone from VERSIONS.txt via API (no checkout yet)[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5100819Z [36;1mCURRENT=$(gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/contents/scripts/VERSIONS.txt?ref=$GITHUB_REF" \[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5101946Z [36;1m  --jq '.content' | base64 -d | grep '^libSkiaSharp.*milestone' | awk '{print $NF}')[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5102790Z [36;1mecho "current=$CURRENT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5103331Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5103708Z [36;1mNEXT=$((CURRENT + 1))[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5104208Z [36;1mecho "next=$NEXT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5104779Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5105275Z [36;1m# Find latest upstream chrome/m* branch (no clone needed)[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5106237Z [36;1mLATEST=$(git ls-remote --heads https://github.com/google/skia.git 'refs/heads/chrome/m*' \[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5107392Z [36;1m  | sed -n 's|.*refs/heads/chrome/m\([0-9]*\)$|\1|p' \[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5108015Z [36;1m  | sort -n | tail -1)[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5108564Z [36;1mecho "latest=$LATEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5109107Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5109472Z [36;1m# Pick target[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5109929Z [36;1mif [ "$MODE" = "latest" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5110441Z [36;1m  TARGET="$LATEST"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5110923Z [36;1melif [ "$MODE" = "current" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5111442Z [36;1m  TARGET="$CURRENT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5111875Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5112433Z [36;1m  TARGET="$NEXT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5112866Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5113296Z [36;1mecho "target=$TARGET" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5113836Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5114219Z [36;1m# Verify upstream branch exists[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5115201Z [36;1mif ! git ls-remote --exit-code https://github.com/google/skia.git "refs/heads/chrome/m${TARGET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5116314Z [36;1m  echo "::notice::upstream/chrome/m${TARGET} does not exist yet"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5117137Z [36;1m  exit 1[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5117525Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5117875Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5118324Z [36;1m# Check if autobump branch is already up-to-date[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5119360Z [36;1mUPSTREAM_TIP=$(git ls-remote https://github.com/google/skia.git "refs/heads/chrome/m${TARGET}" | awk '{print $1}')[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5120820Z [36;1mBRANCH_TIP=$(git ls-remote https://github.com/mono/skia.git "refs/heads/autobump/skia-m${TARGET}" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5122007Z [36;1mif [ -n "$BRANCH_TIP" ] && [ "$BRANCH_TIP" = "$UPSTREAM_TIP" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5122882Z [36;1m  echo "::notice::autobump/skia-m${TARGET} tip matches upstream — up-to-date"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5123602Z [36;1m  exit 1[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5123968Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5124314Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5124944Z [36;1mecho "Will process: m${TARGET} (mode=${MODE}, current=m${CURRENT}, latest=m${LATEST})"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5133656Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
